ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the customer */,
  "purchase_estimate" INTEGER /* Estimated annual purchase amount */,
  "credit_rating" TEXT /* Credit rating of the customer */,
  "num_dependants" INTEGER /* Number of dependants the customer has */,
  "num_dependants_employed" INTEGER /* Number of dependants who are employed */,
  "num_dependants_count" INTEGER /* Total number of dependants in the household */,
  "household_income" INTEGER /* Total household income */,
  "income_lower" INTEGER /* Lower bound of the income range */,
  "income_upper" INTEGER /* Upper bound of the income range */,
  "household_buy_potential" TEXT /* Household buy potential range */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer record was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the customer data */,
  "segmentation_tag" TEXT /* Tag used for customer segmentation */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level assigned to the customer */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "street_address" TEXT /* Street address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address */,
  "primary_address" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this is the primary address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the address record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the address record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES customers ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact entry */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "mobile_phone" TEXT /* Mobile phone number of the customer */,
  "contact_type" TEXT /* Type of contact */,
  "primary_contact" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this is the primary contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the contact record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the contact record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES customers ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial record */,
  "income" REAL /* Total income of the customer */,
  "expenses" REAL /* Total expenses of the customer */,
  "savings" REAL /* Total savings of the customer */,
  "assets" REAL /* Total assets of the customer */,
  "liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities of the customer */,
  "record_type" TEXT /* Type of financial record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the financial record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the financial record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_records_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES customers ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit history record */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "history_date" TEXT /* Date of the credit history record */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the customer */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit of the customer */,
  "credit_utilization" REAL /* Credit utilization of the customer */,
  "credit_inquiries" INTEGER /* Number of credit inquiries for the customer */,
  "history_type" TEXT /* Type of credit history record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the credit history record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the credit history record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_history_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES customers ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependants" (
  "dependant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependant */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "dependant_name" TEXT /* Name of the dependant */,
  "dependant_age" INTEGER /* Age of the dependant */,
  "dependant_employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the dependant */,
  "dependant_type" TEXT /* Type of dependant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dependant record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dependant record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependants_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES customers ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., Property, Vehicle, Investment) */,
  "asset_value" REAL /* Value of the asset */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date of asset acquisition */,
  "asset_status" TEXT /* Status of the asset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the asset record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the asset record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_assets_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES customers ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_liabilities" (
  "liability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each liability */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "liability_type" TEXT /* Type of the liability (e.g., Mortgage, Loan, Credit Card Debt) */,
  "liability_value" REAL /* Value of the liability */,
  "liability_due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the liability */,
  "liability_status" TEXT /* Status of the liability */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the liability record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the liability record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("liability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_liabilities_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES customers ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user record was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer whose data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES customers ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
